ensemble.name: ensemble_name
ensemble.documentation: A human-readable name or label for this ensemble.

ensemble.name: value_type
ensemble.documentation: A short code describing what the stored values represent, e.g. 'spiketimes', 'firingrate', or 'binary'.

ensemble.name: value_description
ensemble.documentation: Free text describing the meaning and units of each stored value (e.g. 'time of the n-th spike of neuron i, in the stimulator clock').

ensemble.name: num_neurons
ensemble.documentation: The number of neurons (elements) that make up the ensemble. Equal to the number of neuron_id_# dependencies and to the number of rows of the stored activity array.

ensemble.name: num_dimensions
ensemble.documentation: The number of dimensions of the stored sparse activity array (2 for a neuron-by-sample matrix).

ensemble.name: clocktype
ensemble.documentation: The name of the ndi.time.clocktype in which the stored values are expressed, if the values are times (e.g. 'dev_local_time'). Empty if not applicable.
